name: ✧ 𝕋𝕣𝕒𝕟𝕤𝒻𝓊𝓇𝓇𝕞𝕒𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟 ✧
description:
The Furry Infection Has Begun
You can either be a Goo or a Human. In a lab, a man wished to create a creature that would benefit mankind. But a sabotage caused the Goos to go insane, corrupting the world with the Goo Infection. You can be a human, and along with some other folks, win this battle... Or be a Goo and terrorize humans. Or be in a world where it is only Goos. You choose how this world plays out, because Transfurrmation is an open transfur world! Now, here is some bonus info!

Update! SPOOKY MONTH GOO, Meowpire! Suggested by @AllanTheFox


Goos are furries that have a goo-like texture. they can take over a human by enveloping the victim. Different species of Goo, like a Tiger Goo and a Shark Goo, and actually convert each other to their Goo Species. A Tiger Goo can make a Shark Goo to a Tiger Goo, vice versa, and for any other species! Not all Goos are mindless only meant to spread their Goo Species. Some Goos are more friendly than other types of Goos, many do not know why. These are the current types of Goos and how they turn you into a Goo:

Goo Kitty (Enveloped by a Goo Kitty or falling in a paw shaped Goo Puddle [50%])
Goo Pup (Enveloped by a Goo Pup or falling in a paw shaped Goo Puddle [50%])
Snack Slimes (Enveloped by a Snack Slime or eating food with the part of a Snack Slime on it. The food that you eat you will turn into a version of a Snack Slime)
Snow Goopard (Enveloped by a Snow Goopard or freezing)
Sharkgoo (Enveloped by a Sharkgoo)
Crystal Goo (Enveloped by a Crystal Goo or if you touch a crystal)
Leogoo (Enveloped by a Leogoo)

Red Panda Slime (Enveloped by a Red Panda Slime)
Garden Goo (Enveloped by a Garden Goo or attacked by Goo Plant)
Dark Goo (Enveloped by a Dark Goo or attacked by Crow Goos)

Light Goos (Enveloped by a Light Goo or attacked by Dove Goos)
Kitsune Goo (Enveloped by a Kitsune Goo or mutated version of a Goo Kitty)
Squirrel Slime (Enveloped by A Squirrel Slime or falling in a leaf shaped Goo Puddle)
Cerebrus Goo (Enveloped by a Cerebrus Goo or a mutated version of a Goo Pup)
Deer Goo (Enveloped by a Deer Goo)
Slime Snake (Enveloped by a Slime Snake)
BunnBunn (Enveloped by a Bunn. A Bunn is a small Goo bunny that will always attack humans)

Flame Goo (Enveloped by a Flame Goo or burnt by the Flare Crystals. They are enemies with Water Goos.)
